headline: Shares of data center-related companies are trading higher amid optimism that that Middle East conflict may be resolved sooner. Also, Fed Chair Powell's remarks that inflation is in check are providing support for risk assets.
summary: Shares of data center-related companies are trading higher amid optimism that that Middle East conflict may be resolved sooner. Also, Fed Chair Powell's remarks that inflation is in check are providing support for risk assets.

raw.headline: Shares of data center-related companies are trading higher amid optimism that that Middle East conflict may be resolved sooner. Also, Fed Chair Powell's remarks that inflation is in check are providing support for risk assets.

headline: Nebius unveils plans to build one of Europe's largest AI factories as region scrambles for compute
summary: Europe is racing to create the infrastructure needed to power the AI boom.
